name: SegmentedControl
description: A compact toggle control for switching between 2–5 mutually exclusive options. Use for view mode switches, layout toggles, or filter selections where all options should be visible simultaneously.
instructions: Compose as SegmentedControl.Root > SegmentedControl.Item. Each item requires a unique value prop. Use defaultValue for uncontrolled usage or value + onValueChange for controlled. Use hugWidth=false to stretch to container width. Pair with a Label for accessibility. Use Tabs when switching also changes the visible content panel below. Use RadioList for longer option sets.
